wordplay_note: Named for glimmering — a being of flickering divine light
card_description: Glimmung is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Galactic Pot-Healer*. Alien deity-figure who recruits artisans from across the galaxy to raise a cathedral. Name note: Named for glimmering — a being of flickering divine light. The ambiguous god — both creator and potential destroyer. First appears in *Galactic Pot-Healer*. Context: "Dick interprets the transition from the beginning of Acts (small church) to the end (Rome penetrated) as a roadmap for the 3-74 revolution."
